titles_tesim: Portion of another service for the lantern in the hand of the servants
Prayer for the holy oil of the lamp, including stichera and canons
Prayer over one wishing to join the monastery
Prayers for various occasions, including for the Christian convert to Islam, for the convert to Islam who converts back to Christianity, and for those who succumb to fantasia
Service before taking on the habit after dinner
Service recited after the bell for Mass
